channel.title: Review of Network Economics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Review of Network Economics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Kim P. Huynh, Jozsef Molnar, Oleksandr Shcherbakov, Qinghui (Jerry) Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rne-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: The Impact of Competition Intensity on Software Security: An Empirical Analysis of Web Browser Patch Releases
item.description: Article by Kim P. Huynh, Jozsef Molnar, Oleksandr Shcherbakov, Qinghui (Jerry) Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rne-2024-0045

item.title: Demand for Payment Services and Consumer Welfare: The Introduction of a Central Bank Digital Currency
item.description: Article by Kim P. Huynh, Jozsef Molnar, Oleksandr Shcherbakov, Qinghui (Jerry) Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rne-2024-0056
